metrolink: Welcome to Metrolink. Please ensure you have a valid ticket before travelling. For up to date travel information contact Metrolink twitter on @BeeNetwork or visit www.TfGM.com.

crew_quote: "Blimey, it’s hotter in here than my last curry night, and just when I thought I could enjoy a dry spell, there’s patchy rain creeping in like Rimmer at a quiz!"
